insured.first_name: first name of the insured individual.
insured.middle_name: middle name of the insured individual.
insured.last_name: last name of the insured individual.

lead_repo.email: email address of the insured individual.
lead_repo.phone_number: phone number of the insured individual.

insured_address.street_address: Street address line of the insured individual.
insured_address.city: City name of the insured individual.
insured_address.state: State or province of the insured individual.
insured_address.zip_code: Postal or ZIP code of the insured individual.

mailing_address.street_address: Mailing street address line of the insured individual.
mailing_address.city: Mailing city name of the insured individual.
mailing_address.state: Mailing state or province of the insured individual.
mailing_address.zip_code: Mailing postal or ZIP code of the insured individual.

name.first_name: first name of the co-insured individual.
name.middle_name: middle name of the co-insured individual.
name.last_name: last name of the co-insured individual.

co_insured.date_of_birth: Date of birth of the co-insured individual.
co_insured.gender: Gender identity of the co-insured individual.
co_insured.relationship: Relationship of co-insured to primary insured.
co_insured.marital_status: Current marital status of the co-insured individual.

policy_details.effective_date: date when the insurance policy becomes effective.
policy_details.expiration_date: date when the insurance policy expires.
policy_details.policy_term_length: length of the policy term, difference between effective_date and expiration_date in months.

coverage_details.uninsured_motorist_pd: uninsured motorist property damage coverage limit.

name.first_name: First (given) name of the individual driver, exactly as written in the document.
name.middle_name: Middle name of the individual driver, if explicitly mentioned in the document. Leave empty if not present.
name.last_name: Last (family/surname) of the individual driver, exactly as written in the document.

driver_details.date_of_birth: Date of birth of the individual driver, as stated in the document (do not infer or calculate).
driver_details.gender: Gender of the individual driver, only if explicitly mentioned in the document.
driver_details.relationship: Relationship of the driver to the primary insured, as explicitly stated.
driver_details.marital_status: Marital status of the individual driver, only if clearly specified in the document.
driver_details.license_status: Current driver’s license status (e.g., valid, suspended), only if explicitly mentioned.
driver_details.licensed_state: State that issued the driver’s license, as written in the document.
driver_details.license_number: Driver’s license number, exactly as shown in the document.
driver_details.licensed_age: Age at which the driver was first licensed, only if explicitly stated (do not calculate from dates).
driver_details.rated: Boolean value indicating whether the driver is listed as a rated driver on the policy. Set only if clearly indicated.
driver_details.driver_discounts: List or description of driver-related discounts explicitly mentioned for this driver.
driver_details.good_student_discount: Boolean value indicating good student discount eligibility, only if explicitly stated.
driver_details.mature_driver_discount: Boolean value indicating mature driver discount eligibility, only if explicitly stated.
driver_details.safe_driver_discount: Boolean value indicating safe driver discount eligibility, only if explicitly stated.

vehicle_details.model: full model name of the vehicle including trim level.

assigned_driver.first_name: first name of the insured individual assigned to this vehicle.
assigned_driver.middle_name: middle name of the insured individual assigned to this vehicle.
assigned_driver.last_name: last name of the insured individual assigned to this vehicle.

vehicle_details.garaged_state: state where the vehicle is garaged.

garaging_address.street: Street address line of the garaging address.
garaging_address.city: City name of the garaging address.
garaging_address.state: State or province of the garaging address.
garaging_address.zip_code: Postal or ZIP code of the garaging address.

vehicle_details.financed_vehicle: Whether the vehicle is financed. (type: Boolean)

coverage_details.full_glass_coverage: Whether full glass coverage is included. (type: Boolean)

vehicle_details.rented_on_turo: Whether the vehicle is rented on Turo. (type: Boolean)
vehicle_details.ownership_type: type of ownership of the vehicle.
vehicle_details.anti_theft_installed: Whether an anti-theft device is installed. (type: Boolean)

mortgage_details.mortgage_vehicle_name: Name or identifier of mortgaged vehicle.
mortgage_details.mortgage_company: Name of the mortgage or lien holder company.
mortgage_details.mortgage_phone: Phone number of the mortgage company.
mortgage_details.mortgage_email: Email address of the mortgage company.

insured.first_name: first name of the insured individual.
insured.middle_name: middle name of the insured individual.
insured.last_name: last name of the insured individual.

lead_repo.email: email address of the insured individual.
lead_repo.phone_number: phone number of the insured individual.

insured_address.street_address: Street address line of the insured individual.
insured_address.city: City name of the insured individual.
insured_address.state: State or province of the insured individual.
insured_address.zip_code: Postal or ZIP code of the insured individual.

mailing_address.street_address: Mailing street address line of the insured individual.
mailing_address.city: Mailing city name of the insured individual.
mailing_address.state: Mailing state or province of the insured individual.
mailing_address.zip_code: Mailing postal or ZIP code of the insured individual.

name.first_name: first name of the co-insured individual.
name.middle_name: middle name of the co-insured individual.
name.last_name: last name of the co-insured individual.

co_insured.date_of_birth: Date of birth of the co-insured individual.
co_insured.gender: Gender identity of the co-insured individual.
co_insured.relationship: Relationship of the co-insured to primary insured.
co_insured.marital_status: Current marital status of the co-insured.

policy_details.effective_date: date when the insurance policy becomes effective.
policy_details.expiration_date: date when the insurance policy expires.
policy_details.policy_term_length: length of the policy term, difference between effective_date and expiration_date in months.

protection_class.dwelling_coverage: amount of coverage for the dwelling. (also known as "Coverage A - dwelling_coverage")
protection_class.other_structure_coverage: amount of coverage for other structures on the property. (also known as "Coverage B - other_structure_coverage")
protection_class.personal_property_coverage: amount of coverage for personal property. (also known as "Coverage C - personal_property_coverage/contents")
protection_class.loss_of_use_coverage: amount of coverage for loss of use. (also known as "Coverage D - loss_of_use_coverage")
protection_class.personal_liability_coverage: amount of coverage for personal liability. (also known as "Coverage E - personal_liability_coverage")
protection_class.medical_payments_coverage: amount of coverage for medical payments. (also known as "Coverage F - medical_payments_coverage")

additional_coverage.increased_cost_of_construction: Increased cost of construction coverage. (type: Boolean)
additional_coverage.replacement_cost_contents: Replacement cost for contents coverage amount.

coverages_deductibles.aop_deductible: deductible amount for all other perils.
coverages_deductibles.wind_hurricane_deductible: deductible amount for wind and hurricane damage.

property_details.roof_type_shape: type and shape of the roof.
property_details.electrical_panel_type: type of electrical panel in the property.
property_details.floors_stories: number of floors or stories in the property.
property_details.construction_style: style of construction of the property.
property_details.construction_quality: quality of construction of the property.
property_details.kitchen_quality: quality of the kitchen in the property.
property_details.bedrooms: number of bedrooms in the property.
property_details.full_bathrooms: number of full bathrooms in the property.
property_details.half_bathrooms: number of half bathrooms in the property.
property_details.bathroom_quality: quality of the bathrooms in the property.
property_details.garage_type: type of garage in the property.
property_details.garage_stalls: number of garage stalls in the property.
property_details.detached_structure_types: types of detached structures on the property.

mortgage_details.mortgage_company: Name of the mortgage or lien holder company.
mortgage_details.mortgage_phone: Phone number of the mortgage company.
mortgage_details.mortgage_email: Email address of the mortgage company.
